name: Saffron Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 sweet red pepper, seeded and cut into thin slices
1 ripe tomato, thinly sliced and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put rice in a pan.
2. Add 3 cups boiling water and the dissolved saffron.
3. Stir to distribute the saffron and bring liquid back to a boil.
4. Cover and cook for 20 minutes or until rice is tender and all the water is absorbed.
5. In a large bowl, mix the vinegar and salt together and slowly whisk in the oils, a few drops at a time.
6. Season with pepper to taste.
7. Add rice to the bowl, together with prepared vegetables.
8. Toss all ingredients until well coated with the vinaigrette.
9. Serve the salad either at room temperature or slightly chilled.
